page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-90-lssd is a general-purpose server configuration powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 45 physical cores and 90 vCPUs with dedicated allocation and multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 360 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, it includes 3216 GB of NVMe SSD capacity distributed across 8 local SSDs. No GPU accelerators are included in this configuration, and it does not provide complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU capabilities, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core performance, PassMark CPU score, and software compilation tasks. Single-core performance is strong, ranking in the top 25% for stress-ng single-core tests. Memory read bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 6372.53 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 217.44 GB/sec for uncached large blocks, though large-block write bandwidth remains in the average tier at 76.89 GB/sec. Cryptographic and vector execution capabilities are enhanced by hardware support for AVX-512 and AES instructions, resulting in top-tier performance in PassMark encryption benchmarks.

The integration of high-capacity local NVMe storage alongside a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes this instance highly resource-dense. It delivers strong database operation metrics and high Redis SET throughput, making it highly efficient for data-intensive workloads without requiring external storage attachments. This server is optimized for workloads such as database hosting, software compilation, static web serving, and medium-scale language model prompt processing.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-90-lssd is a general-purpose server featuring 90 vCPUs and 360 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across 8 drives, with no GPU accelerators. In benchmark testing, the server exhibits top-tier multi-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% for PassMark CPU scores and software compilation. It also delivers strong memory read bandwidth and database operation throughput. The balanced 1:4 memory-to-vCPU ratio combined with high-speed local storage provides a resource-dense profile for data-heavy operations. This server is designed for database hosting, static web serving, software compilation, and medium-scale language model prompt processing.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-90-lssd is a general-purpose server featuring 90 vCPUs, 360 GB RAM, and 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier multi-core CPU performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-90-lssd features 90 vCPUs, 360 GB RAM, and 3216 GB local NVMe SSD storage for database and compute workloads.
tagline: A resource-dense general-purpose server combining ninety AMD EPYC vCPUs with over three terabytes of local NVMe SSD storage.
bullet_points: 90 vCPUs and 45 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor
360 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across 8 bundled drives
Top-tier multi-core CPU performance and software compilation speeds
Strong database operations and high-throughput static web serving
